summary.weather: Seoul (Sunday, March 29, 2026: Generally cloudy, 10°C to 21°C, light breezes, comfortable spring weather.)
summary.market: Market downturn Friday (March 27, 2026). S&P 500 down 1.57%, Nasdaq down 2.15%. AMZN: $199.34 (down 4.02%) on AI CAPEX concerns. INTC: $43.13 (down 2.2%) on mixed sentiment.
summary.art: Global market shows moderate recovery (2025 growth of 4%). Focus on high-end auction sales (>$10M) and quality/provenance. Emerging digital/hybrid spaces continue to gain traction.
